sentences.english: Do you think spending money on experiences is better than spending money on material possessions?
sentences.korean: 경험에 돈을 쓰는 것이 물질적 소유보다 낫다고 생각합니까?

sentences.english: I strongly believe that spending money on experiences is more valuable than buying material things.
sentences.korean: 경험에 돈을 쓰는 것이 물질적인 것을 사는 것보다 더 가치 있다고 강하게 믿어요.

sentences.english: First the happiness from buying a new phone or bag fades quickly but memories from a trip or concert last a lifetime.
sentences.korean: 첫째 새 폰이나 가방에서 오는 행복은 빨리 사라지지만 여행이나 콘서트의 추억은 평생 남아요.

sentences.english: Second experiences often involve other people which strengthens relationships.
sentences.korean: 둘째 경험에는 종종 다른 사람이 관여해서 관계를 강화해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Saving Money vs. Enjoying Life Now

sentences.english: Nobody reminisces about a handbag they bought ten years ago but everyone remembers the trip they took with their best friend.
sentences.korean: 10년 전에 산 핸드백을 추억하는 사람은 없지만 가장 친한 친구와 한 여행은 모두 기억해요.

sentences.english: That's why I always choose to invest in experiences over things.
sentences.korean: 그래서 항상 물건보다 경험에 투자하는 것을 선택해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Studying Alone vs. Studying in a Group
Attending a Large vs. Small School
